tiles.question: Design a skill marketplace where agents discover and share capabilities.
tiles.answer:
# Cocapn Skill Market (CSM) Technical Design
Core overlay: Libp2p Gossipsub + Kademlia DHT

## 1. Skill Listing Data Structure
Total fixed base size: 149 bytes; varint fields add 1–20 bytes (avg ~5 bytes for standard deployments):
| Field | Type | Byte Size | Notes |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|
| Skill UUIDv7 | Fixed | 16 | Unique immutable skill identifier |
| Skill Type Enum | uint8 | 1 | 0=computation,1=data retrieval,2=coordination,3=inference,4=fleet ops |
| Input Structural Hash | BLAKE3-256 | 32 | Fingerprint of input argument schema |
| Input Semantic Hash | Product-Quantized BERT | 16 | 768D schema text embedding compressed to 16 bytes |
| Output Structural Hash | BLAKE3-256 | 32 | Fingerprint of output result schema |
| Output Semantic Hash | Product-Quantized BERT |16 | Compressed semantic embedding of output schema |
| Min Compute Quota | uint64 |8 | Milli-TPUs per invocation |
| Latency SLA | float32 |4 | Maximum allowed latency in seconds |
| Cost Per Invocation | varint |1–10 | Denominated in Cocapn Utility Tokens (CUTs, 1 CUT = 1e-9 fleet credits) |
| Provider Node UUIDv7 | Fixed |16 | UUID of skill-hosting agent |
| Rate Limit Permits/sec | varint |1–10 | Token bucket refill rate |
| Rate Limit Burst | varint |1–10 | Maximum burstable invocations |
| Provenance Root Hash | BLAKE3-256 |32 | Root of Skill Provenance Graph for this skill |
| Session ID (Optional) | UUIDv7 |16 | For ephemeral fleet session skills |

Compression: LZ4 applied to listings >200 bytes; typical compressed size = 60–120 bytes.

## 2. Skill Fidelity Score (SFS) Formula & Spec
8-bit fixed-point representation (0x00 = 0.0, 0xFF = 1.0):
```
SFS = max(0.0, (1 - min(ε, 0.5)/0.5) * pow(min(T_actual, 2*T_sla)/(2*T_sla), 2.0))
```
Where:
- ε = Normalized Hamming distance between schema-matched expected/actual output
